name: SECURITY FEDERAL CORP
summary: Security Federal Corporation is a South Carolina bank holding company for Security Federal Bank, a state-chartered commercial bank headquartered in Aiken, SC. Founded in 1922, the Bank operates 19 branch offices across South Carolina and Georgia counties. It offers retail banking, loans, investment securities management through SFINV, and insurance (auto, business, home) through SFINS. It is a certified CDFI serving low-to-moderate income communities.

products.name: Retail Banking
products.description: Deposit accounts and lending services offered through 19 branch offices in SC and GA.

products.name: Investment Securities Management
products.description: Security Federal Investments, Inc. (SFINV) holds and manages the Bank's investment securities portfolio.

products.name: Insurance Agency
products.description: Security Federal Insurance, Inc. (SFINS) offers auto, business, and home insurance products.

products.name: CDFI Lending
products.description: Loans and financial services targeting low-to-moderate income census tracts and underserved communities.

partnerships.description: Received $82.9 million ECIP investment in exchange for 82,949 shares of Preferred Stock to support CDFI lending mission.
